_meta.source: Atticus Project MAUD (Merger Agreement Understanding Dataset)
_meta._instructions: Populate `instances` by downloading MAUD from https://www.atticusprojectai.org/maud and running scripts/lib-benchmarks.js maudFromCsv() on the source CSV. Each instance must follow the schema in `_schema`.

instance.id: string (stable across runs — derived from MAUD doc_id + annotation_id)
instance.source_doc_text: string (full agreement text, truncated to 30k chars if needed; truncated flag set if so)
instance.question: string (partner-facing question template; M&A-focused)
